author: Besting
text: AFFECTED by config/store split: docs/release-notes must cover the new model — two branches (balls/config landing + balls/tasks store), landing = sole authority / all config is RCE, install = path-copy with the COUNTERINTUITIVE folder=mirror(wipe) vs glob=union edge (the skill-doc line that earns its keep), prime --install recursion, the default-config/ seed folder, implicit founding + --stealth, and the non-default-branch tracker warning. bl-2e26 §0/§1/§4/§6/§12.
